steps.t: Angmar's emissary must reside deep within the cave in Taur Gonwaith, south-east of Lin Giliath. You should defeat the emissary of Angmar that has gain…
Thaliollang is at Lin Giliath, north-west of Taur Gonwaith. Thaliollang will be pleased to know that he was correct in his belief: there was an emissa…
